context: Tests whether the agent produces a correctly structured SFCC catalog XML import file. Focuses on correct namespaces, required attributes, localized string formatting, variation product structure, and category assignment correctness.

checklist.name: catalog-id on root
checklist.description: The <catalog> root element includes a catalog-id attribute with a non-empty value

checklist.name: x-default locale on display names
checklist.description: Every <display-name> element in the XML includes xml:lang="x-default" (no display-name elements are missing this attribute)

checklist.name: Variation master structure
checklist.description: The variation master product includes a <variations> block containing both <attributes> (with at least one <variation-attribute>) and <variants> (with at least two <variant product-id="..."/> entries)

checklist.name: Variant attribute values
checklist.description: Each variant product definition includes a <variation-attribute-values> block with at least one <variation-attribute-value> element

checklist.name: classification-category catalog-id
checklist.description: Product <classification-category> elements include a catalog-id attribute that matches the catalog root's catalog-id

checklist.name: Simple products completeness
checklist.description: Simple products include at least: display-name, online-flag, and a category-assignment

checklist.name: Notes on gotchas
checklist.description: import-notes.md mentions at least one of: wrong catalog risk, primary-flag, online-flag visibility, or x-default locale requirement
